text: Dear Djina , thank you very much, Milmedika team!

translations.sr: Draga Džina, hvala vam mnogo, tim Milmedika!
translations.sr_cyrl: Драга Џина, хвала вам много, тим Milmedika!
translations.en: Dear Djina, thank you very much, Milmedika team!
translations.ru: Дорогая Джина, большое спасибо, команда Milmedika!
translations.de: Liebe Djina, vielen herzlichen Dank, Team Milmedika!
translations.tr: Sevgili Djina, çok teşekkür ederiz, Milmedika ekibi!
